zh.lifeSummary: 當Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale於1122年出生在愛爾蘭武爾斯特時，他的父親Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy"29歲，母親Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale27歲。他於1140年之前與Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1158年之後在蘇格蘭阿吉爾，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.Knapdale, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾可納達爾
zh-hans.County Fermanagh, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 費馬納格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale于1122年出生在爱尔兰武爾斯特时，他的父亲Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy"29岁，母亲Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale27岁。他于1140年之前与Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1158年之后在苏格兰阿吉爾，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .

en.lifeSummary: When Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale was born in 1122, in Ulster, Ireland, his father, Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy", was 29 and his mother, Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, was 27. He married Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont before 1140, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died after 1158, in Argyll, Scotland, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale est né en 1122, à Ulster, Irlande, son père, Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy", avait 29 ans et sa mère, Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont avant 1140, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé après 1158, à Argyll, Écosse, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale 1122 in Ulster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy" 29 und seine Mutter Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale 27. Er hat vor 1140 in Argyll, Scotland Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb nach 1158 in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale è nato il nel 1122 nel Ulster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy", aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont prima del 1140, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1158, nel Argyll, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdaleが1122年にアイルランドウルスターで生まれた時，父Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy"は29歳，母Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdaleは27歳であった。1140年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでIngen MacGillebride of Lamontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1158年以後にスコットランドアルグイルで死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale(이)가 1122년 아일랜드 울스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy"(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1140년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1158년 이후 스컷랜드 아그이에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale nasceu em 1122, em Ulster, Irlanda, seu pai, Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy", tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont antes 1140, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1158, em Argyll, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale родился в 1122 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy" было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont перед 1140 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер после 1158 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duinsleibhe O'Neill Lord of Knapdale nació en 1122, en Ulster, Irlanda, su papá, Prince Aodh Alainn O’Neill "The Clumsy", tenía 29 años y su mamá, Princess of Argyll Heiress of Cowal and Knapdale, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ingen MacGillebride of Lamont antes de 1140, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1158, en Argyll, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Argyll, Scotland.
